eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Yavapai, AZ; at 1:34 PM on JUL 4, 2026 Effective until 1:34 PM JUL 5, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Yavapai Sheriff Alert: 07/04/2026 1:21 PM
There is a wildfire near Enchantment Area. SET Status for YCU-1136. Gather essential supplies. Prepare to evacuate. Info:https://go.genasys.com/2gg828.
